info.title: Dead Man's Switch
info.description: Watch dead man's switch: periodic 'you still there?' check-ins that escalate through alert -> warn -> alarm -> emergency notification states until acknowledged. This API is used by the plugin's companion webapp, and can equally be driven by an external ack source such as a physical hardware button.

tags.name: Switch
tags.description: Query and control the dead man's switch

get.description: Returns the current escalation stage, the countdown remaining in that stage's window (if any), the configured notification path, and the active per-stage timing configuration. Always returns a fresh value - the response is never cached.

post.description: Acknowledges the switch from any stage (including while merely armed and waiting, where it's a no-op reset). Clears any active notification and restarts the check-in interval from zero. A no-op (ok: false) if the switch is currently disarmed - use POST /arm instead.
(Re-)arms the switch: clears any live notification and starts the check-in interval countdown fresh.
Stops all timers and clears any live notification. No check-ins are requested again until the switch is re-armed via POST /arm.

SwitchState.description: Current escalation stage. 'disarmed' and 'armed' are not escalated; 'alert'/'warn'/'alarm'/'emergency' are, in ascending order of severity, and also double as the SignalK notification `state` value published at the plugin's configured notification path. 'emergency' is terminal - the switch does not escalate past it on its own.

StageConfig.description: The per-stage timing configuration currently in effect (set via the plugin's admin config page).

checkIntervalMinutes.description: Minutes waited, once armed or acknowledged, before the first check-in prompt (stage 'alert') is raised.

ackWindowSeconds.description: Seconds to acknowledge before escalating from 'alert' to 'warn'.

warnWindowSeconds.description: Seconds to acknowledge before escalating from 'warn' to 'alarm'.

alarmWindowSeconds.description: Seconds to acknowledge before escalating from 'alarm' to 'emergency'.

secondsRemaining.description: Seconds left in the current stage's window before it escalates (or, while 'armed', before the first check-in prompt is raised). Null while disarmed or in 'emergency' (which has no deadline - terminal, no further auto-escalation).

deadlineAt.description: Epoch milliseconds the current timer will fire at, if any (null under the same conditions as secondsRemaining).

notificationPath.description: Full SignalK path (including the leading 'notifications.') the plugin publishes escalation notifications to.

ok.description: False only if the switch was disarmed (acknowledging does nothing in that case).

secondsRemaining.description: Seconds until the next check-in prompt, now that the switch has been freshly armed by this acknowledgement.
Seconds until the next check-in prompt.
